meta.title: Unlocking Bulgaria — Travel Through the Hidden Memory of Bulgaria
meta.description: A premium mobile app for exploring Bulgaria through real-world mystery quests, four Master Key Domains, a Cave gateway, optional Guardian Sight, permanent relics, and the Living Covenant. Become a Keeper.
meta.ogTitle: Unlocking Bulgaria — 1345 Years. One Name Survived.
meta.ogDescription: Walk the real land. Awaken memory. Become a Keeper.

hero.question: How?
hero.lede: Walk the path. Awaken memory. Become a Keeper.
hero.mapLabel: Interactive map of Bulgaria's hidden memory
hero.phoneDesc: Enter the place where the land was watching before the Name.
hero.portalFinalCta: ✨ The connection is established! To activate the live AR sight beneath the Eyes of God, download the app:

band.sub: Not a guide. Not a map. Not a game.
band.statement: A real-world journey through Bulgaria's living memory.

howItWorks.heading:
Become a Keeper,
one place at a time.
howItWorks.lede: Every journey in Unlocking Bulgaria follows a clear progression — from one real checkpoint to the four Master Keys and the Living Covenant.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Visit a Checkpoint
steps.desc: Travel to a real place. Activate the checkpoint by arriving at the location. Unlock a story, a clue, or a hidden layer.

steps.label: Step 2 — 4 Checkpoints
steps.title: Complete a Route → Collect a Relic
steps.desc: Four connected checkpoints form a Route. Each checkpoint grants an Artifact. Complete the route to assemble a permanent Route Relic.

steps.label: Step 3 — 4 Routes
steps.title: Complete a Domain → Earn a Seal
steps.desc: Four routes complete a Master Key Domain. Earn its Seal — the mark of mastery over that memory layer.

steps.label: Step 4 — 4 Master Keys
steps.title: Living Covenant → Become a Keeper
steps.desc: Complete the four main Domains. Assemble the four Master Keys. Unlock the Living Covenant and receive the responsibility of Keeper — Пазител.

domains.heading:
Four pillars.
One hidden answer.
domains.lede: Four main quest Domains hold the Master Keys of Bulgaria's living memory. The Cave Domain stands apart as the gateway where the Keeper first awakens.
lures:
Before the Name, the land already remembered.
Thracian tombs, royal valleys, and the Black Stone hold the Earth Master Key.

The sea does not remember names.
It remembers movement, courage, and the spark that endures.

Sacred routes and monasteries kept vigilance alive in the north.
The White Flame burned in prayer on the watchtowers.

The mountain tests the body.
Protection becomes worthy only when it serves something greater.

The caves are thresholds.
Prohodna opens the path before the answer begins.

cards.name: The Kings Domain
cards.key: Thracian royal tombs, the Rose Valley, Perperikon, and the Black Stone — the Earth Master Key.

cards.name: The Sea Gate
cards.key: Harbors, cliffs, fortresses, vows, and the Living Spark — the Soul Master Key.

cards.name: The Sacred Traces
cards.key: Sacred routes, monasteries, watchpost fortresses, and the White Flame — the Spirit Master Key.

cards.name: The Golden Gate
cards.key: Mountain passes, fortress guardians, refuges, and the Golden Spear — the Body Master Key.

cards.name: The Cave Domain
cards.key: A pre-sequel gateway of caves and thresholds. Prohodna awakens the Keeper before the main quest.

guardianSight.heading: Every place remembers.
guardianSight.lede: Guardian Sight is the Keeper's optional way of seeing what a place has witnessed. It reveals traces, symbols, and memory without making AR required.
guardianSight.sightBody: Point your camera at the land. The hidden layer appears beneath what time concealed.
guardianSight.ariaVisual: Guardian Sight AR interface — animated scanning rings

features.title: Symbolic traces
features.subtitle: The traces never disappear
features.desc: Some places hold imprints from people, events, and legends. The Keeper's Sight helps you see them again.

features.title: Presence at the site
features.subtitle: Every place holds memory
features.desc: When you approach a meaningful location, the world begins revealing the hidden layers of its history.

features.title: Always accessible
features.subtitle: The story remains accessible
features.desc: AR is an additional layer. All content can be experienced without it, anywhere and at any time.

features.title: Heroic moments
features.subtitle: Moments of revelation
features.desc: At sacred sites, at route finales, and at key discoveries — special scenes and rewards await.

prohodna.heading:
The Eyes of God
remember.
prohodna.lede: Stand inside Prohodna. Look up through the twin openings. Before the Name, the Earth was already watching.
prohodna.sliderLabel: Drag to reveal the Guardian Sight sacred layer
prohodna.guruCaption: Before the Name, the land already remembered.
prohodna.guruNote: Guardian Sight reveals Prohodna as a threshold — Earth below, sky above, and the first question a Keeper must answer.
prohodna.altBase: Prohodna Cave, Bulgaria — the two natural sky openings called the Eyes of God, seen from inside the cave tunnel
prohodna.altOverlay: Guardian Sight layer: celestial light through the Eyes of God, Earth-memory glyphs, and a slow Keeper resonance — the cave as witness before the Name
prohodna.liveOn: Guardian Sight activated — sacred layer revealed
prohodna.credit: Photo: placeholder · Licensed image of Prohodna Cave required · See README

scenes.name: Prohodna Cave
scenes.reality: A natural cave. Two sky openings above. Stone worn by millennia of rain.
scenes.revealed: The Sacred Stone speaks. The Eyes of God unlock the hidden memory of the land.

scenes.name: Madara Rider
scenes.reality: A relief carved 1300 years ago into living rock. Visible to all. Understood by few.
scenes.revealed: Ancient inscriptions emerge. The rider's story — and the origin of the Name — become legible.

scenes.name: Ancient Fortress
scenes.reality: Ruins on a hilltop. Stones worn by centuries. A silent record of what stood here.
scenes.revealed: The fortress walls rise again. The defense of the Name and its people becomes visible.

scenes.name: Sacred Site
scenes.reality: An unremarkable place. Nothing visible from the surface.
scenes.revealed: Energy traces surface. An Artifact waits. The quest moves one layer deeper.

timeline.heading:
The memory
that refused to die.
timeline.lede: 1345 years of Bulgarian history — compressed into the moments that defined the name, the faith, and the language.
timeline.sub: Follow the line. See what survived.

events.title: Khan Asparuh establishes the Bulgarian state.
events.body: By the Danube, a federation of Bulgars and Slavs forms the first Bulgarian state — recognized by the Byzantine Empire after a decisive military victory. The name Bulgaria enters history. A name that will survive everything that follows.

events.title: A new alphabet is born for the Slavic peoples.
events.body: Two brothers from Thessaloniki create the Glagolitic script — the foundation of the later Cyrillic alphabet. For the first time, the Slavic world has letters of its own. Bulgaria will adopt and preserve this legacy for centuries.

events.title: Khan Boris I accepts Christianity for Bulgaria.
events.body: In a calculated political act of profound cultural consequence, Khan Boris I converts Bulgaria to Christianity. A new identity forms around faith and literacy. Pliska and Preslav become centers of Slavic Christian civilization.

events.title: Old Bulgarian becomes the official language of state and church.
events.body: Under Tsar Simeon I, the Preslav Literary School flourishes. Old Bulgarian replaces Greek in all official contexts. Bulgaria becomes a literary and spiritual powerhouse at the center of medieval Europe.

events.title: Bulgaria falls — but the name endures.
events.body: Basil II conquers Bulgaria after decades of war. The Bulgarian state ceases to exist for 167 years. Yet the name, the language, and the memory survive — carried in monasteries, in villages, in oral tradition, in the stones themselves.

events.title: The Second Bulgarian Empire rises from Tarnovo.
events.body: Brothers Asen and Peter lead an uprising from the Tarnovo hills. Bulgaria is reborn — the only medieval Slavic state to reconstitute itself after complete conquest. The name survived. The memory returned. The journey continues.

features.heading:
Everything needed for
a living exploration.
features.lede: The features do not distract from the journey — they guide it, deepen it and keep it accessible.

items.title: Real quests
items.desc: GPS-based routes guide you to real places where history is experienced on location.

items.title: Cinematic storytelling
items.desc: Each checkpoint unlocks a short narrative moment designed to feel like a scene, not a dry fact sheet.

items.title: Guardian Sight AR
items.desc: An optional AR layer reveals symbols, artifacts and hidden traces over the real world.

items.title: Historical timeline
items.desc: The journey connects places with 1345 years of memory — clearly, visually and meaningfully.

items.title: Artifacts and relics
items.desc: You collect symbolic discoveries that mark progress and unlock deeper layers of the story.

items.title: Domains, seals and keys
items.desc: Each completed stage brings the Keeper closer to the greater national revelation.

items.title: 14 languages
items.desc: The app is prepared for international travelers, families and cultural explorers.

items.title: Family exploration
items.desc: Designed for parents, children and friends who want to discover Bulgaria together.

download.heading:
Become a Keeper
of Bulgaria.
download.lede: The app is coming to iOS and Android. Join the launch list and be ready for the Cave gateway, the first routes, and the four Master Key Domains.
download.trust: iOS & Android · Free to explore · Premium routes available

partners.heading:
Turn real places into
unforgettable journeys.
partners.lede: Unlocking Bulgaria helps destinations package cultural memory as a premium digital layer — sending visitors to real places, supporting local businesses, and strengthening regional identity.

benefits.title: Tourism promotion
benefits.desc: Create modern routes that make lesser-known places easier to discover. Extend the visitor journey beyond main attractions.

benefits.title: Cultural preservation
benefits.desc: Translate local stories, artifacts, traditions, and oral history into durable digital experiences that survive and travel.

benefits.title: Visitor engagement
benefits.desc: Increase dwell time, route completion, repeat visits, and cross-promotion with local hotels, restaurants, and guides.

partners.formSub: For municipalities, museums, tourism boards, schools, hotels, local guides, and businesses.

items.a: Unlocking Bulgaria is a premium mobile app for exploring Bulgaria through real-world mystery quests, cinematic storytelling, optional Guardian Sight, Artifacts, Route Relics, Domain Seals, and the four Master Keys. It is built around one central question: how has the Name of Bulgaria survived for 1345 years?

items.q: Is it a game or a travel guide?
items.a: Neither. It uses game-like progress systems, relics, and rewards — but the real product is cultural exploration in real places. It is closer to a cinematic museum experience combined with GPS navigation and historical storytelling.

items.q: Do I need to be physically in Bulgaria?
items.a: Most of the experience is designed for real-world exploration — visiting actual places in Bulgaria. The map, Domain previews, Cave gateway, and planning content can be explored from anywhere before your journey begins.

items.q: Is AR required to use the app?
items.a: No. Guardian Sight AR is entirely optional. Every AR moment has a full non-AR alternative with readable content, captions, and clear completion logic. The core quest experience works completely without AR.

items.q: Is the app suitable for children?
items.a: Yes. The app is designed to be family-friendly with pacing modes, quiz-style content, and rewards that engage children. Routes support family groups, school trips, and cultural travelers of all ages.
The app supports 14 languages: Bulgarian, English, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Romanian, Turkish, Greek, Hungarian, Chinese, Russian, Japanese, and Serbian.
Basic exploration is available without an account. An account is required to save route progress, collect Artifacts and Relics, track Domain completion, and sync across devices.
Guests can preview the map, Domains, routes, checkpoint teasers, and a Guardian Sight demo. Full routes and Domain bundles are premium one-time purchases: pay once, keep forever.

items.q: Can municipalities and businesses partner with the app?
items.a: Yes. Municipalities, museums, schools, tourism businesses, hotels, and local guides can collaborate on route design, cultural validation, and visitor engagement programs. Use the partnership form to start the conversation.

items.q: Is the app available on Android and iOS?
items.a: Yes. Unlocking Bulgaria is being developed for both iOS and Android. Join the launch list on this page to be notified when the app is available in your region.
